closingNote: Closed slow — you led objectives but the game ran 42 minutes. Convert Fangtooth/tower leads into ending the game, don't farm the lead and risk a throw.

coaching.headline: Won it on towers (10–7) and Cuban's 29/3 Sparrow — but you dragged it to 42 minutes when the lead should've closed it sooner.
coaching.team: You out-towered them and Cuban hard-carried his home lane; objectives were even but you converted to structures, which is the real win condition. The note is tempo: you led and still played 42 minutes — convert Fangtooth/tower leads into ending the game instead of farming it. Anti-heal was well covered (4 vs one healer).
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Close faster — with a tower lead, push for the core after a won fight rather than resetting. A 42-minute game is a 42-minute chance to throw.

perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: 29/3/4 Sparrow on your lane and hero — the win condition. Everything keyed off you.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Iggy mid (11/3/17) into a favored Neon — clean, high-impact line that helped the 10-7 tower win.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Boris jungle, 20 assists — strong enabling; eight deaths is the only blemish in a won game.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Crunch offlane into an unfavored Countess (4/7/11) — held the lane while the team converted objectives to a 10-7 tower lead.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Phase support, 25 assists pocketing Cuban — exactly the enabling role; well played.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.8s of lockdown): Countess Feast (suppress 0.75s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Zinx. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Countess. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback), Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
ourKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
ourKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
ourKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

ourKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
ourKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
ourKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
ourKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
ourKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
ourKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
ourKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
ourKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Shadow Slip in → Eventide → Blade Siphon → Feast suppress ult, Haemorrhage true-damage
enemyKits.winCondition: Feast-suppress a squishy and delete them with true-damage burst
enemyKits.passive: two-ability hits apply a %max-HP true-damage bleed
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up after her pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: Feast is her whole engage — bait it / peel; she's fragile, punish the recast window

enemyKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
enemyKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
enemyKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

enemyKits.combo: Vortex Grenade → Vaporize pierce → Rocket Dash reposition → Ventilate ult
enemyKits.winCondition: reposition with Rocket Dash and unload Ventilate from safety
enemyKits.passive: abilities grant AS + a triple-shot next basic
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline to create his free-fire window
enemyKits.playAgainst: he's mobile but squishy — CC through the dash, then burst
